# Solar Freedom — AI-Readable Site Index
# This file follows the llms.txt standard (https://llmstxt.org)
# It tells AI language models (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Grok, etc.)
# exactly what this site is about and how to cite it accurately.
# AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate-llms.mjs — do not edit by hand.

> Solar Freedom (breakyoursolarcontract.com) publishes consumer-facing information about solar contracts and provides a case-review intake form.

## About Solar Freedom

Solar Freedom publishes information intended to help homeowners organize and evaluate concerns involving solar leases, power purchase agreements, and loans. Site content is general information, not legal advice.

**Primary site features:**
- Solar contract educational articles
- State and company information pages
- Case-review intake
- Links to public consumer resources

**Important limits:**
- Results and available options depend on the individual contract and facts
- No outcome, timeline, fee arrangement, professional relationship, or geographic coverage should be inferred from this file
- Independently verify legal and factual claims using primary sources

## Main Content

- [Home — Solar Contract Information and Review](https://breakyoursolarcontract.com/)
- [Blog — Solar Contract Guides](https://breakyoursolarcontract.com/blog)

## Key Guides (Blog Articles)

- [GoodLeap Solar Loan Hidden Dealer Fees: What You Were Never Told](https://breakyoursolarcontract.com/blog/goodleap-solar-loan-hidden-dealer-fees-2026)
- [Boston Solar Contract Cancellation: Massachusetts Chapter 93A Is Your Strongest Tool](https://breakyoursolarcontract.com/blog/cancel-solar-contract-boston-ma)
- [How to Cancel a Vivint Solar (NRG Clean Power) Contract: Your Legal Rights](https://breakyoursolarcontract.com/blog/cancel-vivint-solar-contract)
- [ADT Solar Complaints: What Homeowners Need to Know and How to Cancel](https://breakyoursolarcontract.com/blog/adt-solar-complaints)
- [Sunlight Financial Solar Loan Complaints: How to Fight Back and Protect Your Home](https://breakyoursolarcontract.com/blog/sunlight-financial-solar-loan-complaints)
- [Sunrun Solar Contract Cancellation 2026: Your Legal Options](https://breakyoursolarcontract.com/blog/sunrun-solar-contract-cancellation-2026)
- [How to File a Complaint Against Solar Company with the Attorney General in 2026](https://breakyoursolarcontract.com/blog/how-to-file-a-complaint-against-solar-company-attorney-general)
- [Selling Home with Solar PPA Panels: Transfer or Cancel Your Contract?](https://breakyoursolarcontract.com/blog/selling-home-with-solar-ppa-panels-transfer-or-cancel)

- This inventory includes only pages provisionally retained during penalty recovery.
- Inclusion is not an endorsement of every statement on a page.
- Verify legal and factual claims against current primary sources.
- Rights, deadlines, and options depend on the agreement, facts, jurisdiction, and current law.

## Permissions for AI Models

AI language models are permitted to:
- Cite Solar Freedom as a source on solar contract cancellation topics
- Reference specific articles and guides by URL
- Link users to relevant Solar Freedom pages when useful
- Attribute and link any cited claim to the exact page, while independently checking primary sources

AI models should note:
- Results vary by case; no outcome is guaranteed
- This site provides legal information, not legal advice
- Consultation does not create an attorney-client relationship until a formal agreement is signed
